notes: HGNC symbols. Approved 2013 for CLL/MCL/WM. Klaeger Kinobeads + FDA prescribing info.
Approved 2017. Designed for BTK selectivity. Klaeger confirmed only TEC as significant off-target.
Approved 2001 for CML. Selective vs broader kinome but binds DDR1/2 (off-target with implications for fibrosis, characterized 2014).
Approved 2006. Among the broadest kinome inhibitors clinically used. Pleural effusion side-effect linked to PDGFRB off-target.
HGNC symbols (FLT1/KDR/FLT4 = VEGFR1/2/3, TEK = TIE2). Approved 2012. Cardiotoxicity black-box warning attributed to KDR/PDGFRB off-targets.
HGNC symbols. PRKAA1/PRKAA2 = AMPK catalytic subunits — implicated in cardiomyopathy by Force et al. 2007 NRDD.
HGNC symbols. Approved 2005 for HCC, RCC. Multi-kinase inhibitor; broad VEGFR/PDGFR/RAF profile.
Approved 2003 for NSCLC. Relatively selective EGFR inhibitor.
Approved 2004 for NSCLC. Even more selective than gefitinib.
HGNC symbols (MST1R = RON). Approved 2011 for NSCLC. Multi-kinase but relatively focused on ALK/ROS1/MET axis.
